sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import '../styles/ResumeContent.css' const ResumeContent = () => (

Nathaniel (Nate) Marcellus

Marietta, GA 30064

nathaniel.j.marcellus@gmail.com

+1 678 748 7858

About Me

My Name is Nate, I'm 16 turning 17, I love coding, socializing with people, and helping anyone who needs it. In my honest opinion, I'm an opportunist and I love trying new things to see what can help me out now to better my future later. I've also worked as an insider for Marco's Pizza, and after the very short time I've worked there, every manager I had has nothing but good things to say about me.

Authorized to work in the US for any employer

Work Experience

Insider
Marco's Pizza - Marietta, GA
August 2022 to Present
I work as an insider, and although I've only worked there for about two months, I've given my managers and team workers nothing but good things to say about me.

Insider
August 2022 to November 2022
As an insider, my job is to act as an authoritative figure for new members if the manager is not around, answer phones, provide customer service, handle cash, and assist with hospitality.

Education

Junior High School Education
Marietta High School - Marietta, GA
August 2020 to Present

Skills

  • Communication skills
  • Math
  • Basic Math
  • Basic Math
  • Organizational Skills
  • Typing
  • Computer Operation
  • Curriculum Development
  • Python
  • JavaScript
  • JavaScript
  • Web development
  • React
  • MySQL
  • Node.js
  • CSS
  • Git
  • HTML5
  • Java
  • User Interface (UI)

Languages

English - Fluent

Assessments

Cooking skills: Basic food preparation — Proficient
July 2022
Preparing food, using cooking equipment, and converting ingredient measurements

Food service fit: Crew member — Proficient
July 2022
Measures the traits that are important for successful food service crew members

Technical support: Customer situations — Proficient
May 2023
Responding to technical support situations with sensitivity

Food service: Customer situations — Proficient
June 2022
Identifying and addressing customer needs in a food service setting

Technical support — Proficient
May 2023
Performing software, hardware, and network operations

Inside sales — Proficient
June 2022
Understanding and responding appropriately in sales scenarios, and performing common sales calculations

Retail customer service — Proficient
November 2022
Responding to customer situations in a retail setting

Work style: Reliability — Proficient
July 2022
Tendency to be reliable, dependable, and act with integrity at work

Customer focus & orientation — Proficient
July 2022
Responding to customer situations with sensitivity

Indeed Assessments provides skills tests that are not indicative of a license or certification, or continued development in any professional field.

); export default ResumeContent;
